props.name: triggerVariant
props.description: Popover — a styled, non-modal floating panel anchored to a trigger button. Behaviour and accessibility (open/close, `aria-haspopup`/`aria-expanded` wiring, Escape to close) come from the headless popover (`@design-system/core`); this adapter adds Floating-UI positioning (flip/shift), outside-press + focus-leave dismissal, and focus management (focus moves into the panel on open, returns to the trigger on Escape).  Slots: `trigger` (the trigger's content) and the default slot (the panel content). Colors, radius and elevation are themeable via `--ds-popover-*`. / import { createPopover, type PopoverContext } from "./create-popover"; import Button from "../button/Button.svelte";  /** Visual variant for the trigger Button.

props.name: placement
props.description: Preferred placement (Floating UI); flips when there's no room.
